commentaries.author: Irenaeus of Lyons
commentaries.content:
And it is He who uses .
And why is this? Has the Word come for the ruin and for the resurrection of many? For the ruin, certainly, of those who do not believe Him, to whom also He has threatened a greater damnation in the judgment-day than that of Sodom and Gomorrah;

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: Sodom also, and Gomorrah, would have escaped if they had fasted.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
